items.title: Watch: Moment crew docks at International Space Station
items.dek: The crew blasted off from Cape Canaveral in a SpaceX Dragon spacecraft atop a Falcon 9 rocket.
items.body: The crew blasted off from Cape Canaveral in a SpaceX Dragon spacecraft atop a Falcon 9 rocket.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Police wear fancy dress in Rio Carnival phone theft sting
items.dek: Two people were arrested after a woman was spotted by a drone grabbing a phone from an attendee.
items.body: Two people were arrested after a woman was spotted by a drone grabbing a phone from an attendee.

items.title: On TikTok, we're all Chinese – but the trend doesn't paint the full picture
items.dek: Chinamaxxing is adding more gloss to the recent flourish of Chinese soft power.
